description:
Use bcWebCam to scan the EAN-13 barcode presented on the camera feed/screen. Extract the 13-digit EAN number and query the SQLite database at C:\workspace\data\inventory.db to find the matching product. Create a text file at C:\workspace\audit_report.txt containing the product details in this exact format:

EAN: [Scanned EAN]
Name: [product_name]
Brand: [brand]

Finally, execute an UPDATE statement on the inventory.db database to set stock_verified = 1 for this specific EAN to mark it as audited.
